changes.summary: New BC-12 InitiateOAuthUseCase centralizes Google and Yandex OAuth initiation: enabled/config checks, OAuth2 state with returnTo, and provider authorize URL construction. Exports OAuthDisabledError, OAuthNotConfiguredError, and createInitiateOAuthUseCase factory.

New BC-12 CompleteOAuthCallbackUseCase handles Google/Yandex callbacks: validates authorization code, delegates to AuthProviderService.authenticateGoogle/authenticateYandex (preserved), establishes OAuth session via EstablishSessionUseCase, and builds intermediate web callback redirect URL. Exports createCompleteOAuthCallbackUseCase factory and buildLoginErrorRedirectUrl helper.

notes: AuthController wiring to these use cases is outside write_set (follow-up). Cookie debug logging and res.redirect remain transport-layer concerns in the controller. buildWebUrl moved into CompleteOAuthCallbackUseCase for callback redirect construction.
